LanguageData.VQE_MinerDrone.label: miner drone
LanguageData.VQE_MinerDrone.description: An automated utility drone. It continuously patrols an area, looking for designated rock to mine. Once rock is found, it will relentlessly drill into it with its large drill.\n\nDrones have a limited lifespan and will begin malfunctioning as they near end-of-life, but can use standby mode to slow component degradation. They require connection to a powered drone transmitter to function.
LanguageData.VQE_MinerDrone.tools.0.label: shell spike
